name: ADR governance correction & re-vetting
description: WP — umbrella for correcting ADR governance after a provenance audit found ADRs reverse-engineered from ephemeral feature plans (the Mentor V2 S0-S6 rollout) and enshrined as canon without architectural vetting (self-asserted PM sign-off; born in feat() PRs; canon prose laced with S0/S4 phase labels). PRINCIPLE: plans inform decisions but must never become canon unvetted; canon must not cite a plan as its spine (passing commentary only); reconstructing a PAST legacy decision is sanctioned (ADR-0000 Part III), laundering a NEW feature-plan choice is banned. SPINE: (1) amend MMT-ADR-0000 to make this crystal clear + require operator sign-off + ban feature-PR-born ADRs; (2) audit ALL ADRs for L3-spine-anchoring (Spike) -> flagged set (prime suspects 0016/0017/0021/0022); (3) per-ADR re-vet as architecture -> keep/amend/supersede/demote, operator rules each, execute + lockstep architecture.md; (4) bring architecture.md up to scratch; (5) reverse-sweep UNBUILT plans vs corrected canon (corrective action pre-build, contradiction-check only). EXECUTION: a single focused architect's-aide session (NOT a swarm -- operator judgment is the bottleneck); prepares + presents in batches; operator rules; every ADR change operator-signed. The 586 cutover runs COMPLETELY SEPARATELY and is never touched. Full brief: _wip/adr-governance-correction/handoff.md. Absorbs WI-751 (retired).
acceptanceCriteria: MMT-ADR-0000 amended (operator-signed) with the reconstruct-vs-launder + L3-in-passing-only + sign-off + no-feature-PR rules (and a forward guard designed or deferred). All ADRs audited for L3-spine-anchoring; every flagged ADR re-vetted to an operator ruling (keep/amend/supersede/demote) and executed with lockstep architecture.md edits. architecture.md carries no plan-as-authority references or phase-label actors. Unbuilt S-phase plans contradiction-checked against corrected canon. Every child Item Closed.
riskImpact: Governance integrity: ADRs (L2, the immutable decision layer) can currently be born inside autonomous feature PRs and reverse-engineered from L3 plans, with self-asserted operator sign-off — inverting the MMT-ADR-0000 documentation-layer model and inviting drift.
bodyText:
Provenance evidence (read-only audit, 2026-06-14)
Our-side ADRs (0007-0015, 0019, 0020) authored by vetinari/jjoerg via deliberate docs(adr) commits with grilling/walkthrough sign-off trails — OUT of scope.
Lineage
Sibling: WI-751 (handles the 0022 head-on re-grounding now)
Surfaced via: the WI-751 provenance double-check requested by the operator
WP Brief — ADR governance correction & re-vetting
Rationale. A provenance audit (2026-06-14/15) found the documentation-layer arrow reversed: several ADRs (L2, the immutable decision layer) were reverse-engineered from ephemeral feature plans (the Mentor V2 S0–S6 rollout) and ratified as canon without architectural vetting — born inside feat() PRs, carrying self-asserted "Deciders: PM (owner)" / "+ Codex" sign-off, with canon prose laced with S0/S4 phase labels as load-bearing actors. Principle: plans inform decisions but must never become canon unvetted; canon must not cite a plan as its spine. Reconstructing a PAST legacy decision is sanctioned (MMT-ADR-0000 Part III); laundering a NEW feature-plan choice is banned.
Strategy (spine). (1) Update MMT-ADR-0000 with the reconstruct-vs-launder + L3-in-passing-only + operator-signed-ratification + dedicated-change-set rules, plus a forward guard (designed or deferred). (2) Audit all ADRs for L3-spine-anchoring — DONE; see findings. (3) Per-flagged-ADR re-vet (one child each) → operator ruling keep/amend/supersede/demote → execute with lockstep architecture.md edits, decontaminating phase labels. (4) Bring architecture.md up to scratch — every surviving canon line traces to a vetted, operator-signed decision; phase labels + plan-as-authority gone. (5) Reverse sweep — contradiction-check the UNBUILT S-phase plans (S3–S6) against corrected canon.
Scope. In: all ADRs (MMT-ADR-0000–0022) + architecture.md + unbuilt S3–S6 plans. Out: the WI-586 staging/prod identity cutover (separate session; already built; never gated by this WP). Calibrated by the reconstruct-vs-launder scalpel — not a blanket purge; some plan-derived ADRs survive as stamped reconstructions.
Findings (audit result — flagged re-vet set).
Verify-and-keep extensions: 0005 ("aka plan §#7" reconstruction smell; architect-seeded), 0020 (architect-authored but feat(database) birth). Clean: 0007–0015, 0018, 0019.
Bundle Acceptance Criteria. MMT-ADR-0000 updated (operator-signed) with the reconstruct-vs-launder + L3-in-passing-only + sign-off + no-feature-PR rules (forward guard designed or deferred). All ADRs audited for L3-spine-anchoring; every flagged ADR re-vetted to an operator ruling (keep/amend/supersede/demote) and executed with lockstep architecture.md edits. architecture.md carries no plan-as-authority references or phase-label actors. Unbuilt S-phase plans contradiction-checked against corrected canon. Every child Item Closed.
